titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 107: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 107. (A.R. No. 592 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Ananteśvarasvamin temple.

Records an endowment of several plots of land after purchase from the brāhmaṇa land holders (of śrī Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam) by Aḍigaḷ Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Kaṇḍaṉ Sundaraśōḻaṉār, in order to feed five brāhmaṇas daily at the courtyard of the temple of Tiruvanantīśvaram in Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam on the northern bank and also for burning a perpetual lamp with an uḻakku of oil daily, for the merit of his younger brother Kaṇḍaṉ Satrubhyaṅkaraṉār. It is also stated that the above two charities were to be done with the balance of the proceeds from the lands donated after remitting taxes iṟai and echchōṟu. He also donated five plates for feeding the brāhmaṇas. The śrīkāriyam of the temple undertook to carry out this charity without fail.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 305.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecarivanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2
Āvitu vaṭakarai brahmateyam(ṉā) śrīviranā
rāyaṇa śaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvanantiśvara
ttu tirumuṟṟattile nicati Aivar brāhmaṇar Uṇ
pataṟkum tirunontāviḷakku 1- kkum Aṭikaḷ pa
ḻuveṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉ cuntaracoḻaṉār ta
mpiyār kaṇṭaṉ catturubhayaṅkaraṉārakkāka ko
ṇṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai Irāma
tevavatikku meṟkku māṉavalla vāykkālu
kku vaṭakku Aiñcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ
catirattu viranārāyaṇaccerikkuk
yar mādhakramavittaṉuḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭakat
tomukkup paṭṭa teṉmelai mūṉṟumā vil I
cceri Iruṅkaṇṭi tirukkuṟuṅkuṭik kirama
vittaṉ viṟṟa nilam Ivvatikke meṟku I
vvāykkālukke vaṭakku Āṟāṅkaṇṇā
ṟṟu mutaṟ catiratte teṟkil Iraṇṭumāvil rājakecari
ceri Otimukkal kraṣṇadeśapuriya bhaṭṭaruḷḷi
ṭṭārkkuppaṭṭa Aṣṭakattile kiḻakkaṭaiya
kiḻakkaṭaiya mirukaṅkaḷur Attāyakramavi
ttaṉ viṟṟa nilam � maṅam Ivaṉe kan
tamaṅkalattu viṟṟuttanta nattakku
ḻi 5- m Ippiṭākaiyile tirunārāyaṇava
tikku meṟku cantiracekarakkāḷukku vaṭakku 2
āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu 2- Ām caturattu teṟkil
(1/4)-vvil viracirikāmukacceri nellikku
tirp periyanampi bhaṭṭaruḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭa
kattomukkuppaṭṭa (1/2)� lil nellik
kutir nākasvāmibhaṭṭaṉ viṟṟa nilam vaṭakka
ṭaiya pakam Āka Innilaṅkaḷil Iṟai
Eccoṟu pokki brāhmaṇar Aivaraium
cantrātittaval Ūṭṭuvataṟ
kum nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇai Āṭṭi
tirunontā viḷakku 1 cantrātitta
val Erippataṟkum Ivare Ibrā
hmaṇaruṇṇa vaitta taḷikai
5- m Ippaṭi Ikkoyilil śrīkā
ryyañ ceyvāre muṭṭāmal ceyvi
kka kaṭavarāka Itu ma(ā)haāsabhai
yār rakṣaiy .§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
